title: Clean up stale documentation and fix CLI references
description: Refresh all documentation to reflect current codebase state. Fix outdated CLI commands, remove deprecated schema fields, consolidate duplicated content, eliminate @coderef/core package references.

phases.title: Fix Critical References
phases.description: Update README.md and fix CLI command references across all docs

tasks.title: Update README.md CLI section
acceptance_criteria: List all 8 CLI commands (coderef-scan, coderef-populate, coderef-rag-index, etc.)
Use correct command syntax (npx coderef-scan, not 'npx coderef scan')
Add installation via git clone + npm install + npm run build:cli

tasks.title: Fix CLI references in ROUTE-VALIDATION.md
acceptance_criteria: Remove completed workorder ID from header
Verify all bash examples are correct

phases.title: Remove Deprecated Content
phases.description: Clean up deprecated schema fields and outdated architecture references

tasks.title: Remove workerPoolSize from SCHEMA.md
acceptance_criteria: Remove workerPoolSize field from ScanOptions schema
Verify no other deprecated fields remain
Check all schema examples are current

tasks.title: Update API.md with missing exports
acceptance_criteria: Verify all exports in src/index.ts are documented

phases.title: Consolidate Duplicated Content
phases.description: Merge related docs to eliminate duplication

tasks.title: Create consolidated ROUTE.md
acceptance_criteria: Organize into sections: Detection, Validation, Examples

tasks.title: Create consolidated MIGRATION.md
acceptance_criteria: Organize into: Overview, Spec, Quick Reference sections

tasks.title: Update AGENT-WORKFLOW-GUIDE.md
acceptance_criteria: Link to CLI.md instead of duplicating

phases.title: Create Missing Documentation
phases.description: Add docs for major systems lacking coverage

tasks.title: Create SCANNER.md
acceptance_criteria: Link to CLI.md for command usage

phases.title: Cleanup and Verify
phases.description: Delete old files and verify all links work

tasks.title: Verify all cross-references
acceptance_criteria: Check all internal doc links are valid
Ensure CLI.md is linked from README.md

tasks.title: Final review and commit
acceptance_criteria: Run markdown lint on all docs
